name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Medium Large Breed Adult Dog Food - Chicken 15kg
description: Reflex Plus Chicken Medium and Large Breed Adult Dog Food is a Super premium dog food with chicken for adult dogs of medium & large breeds. Xylo-oligosaccharides (XOS) are super prebiotics obtained by hydrolyzing corn cobs. With approximately zero calorie value, XOS helps reduce problems such as unwanted fatness and glycemia in cats. XOS enters the large intestine unmodified and is used primarily by the digestive bacteria Bifidobacteria and Lactobacilli. This reduces negative fermentations that cause energy loss, such as bloating and other digestive disorders. Possible Health Benefits: • Strengthens the immune system. • It improves the digestion and metabolism of nutrients by improving the intestinal flora. • Natural antioxidant is effective. Processed Chicken Protein, Wheat, Corn, Chicken Fat, Rice, Sugar Beet, Liver Flavor, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharides, Brewer's Yeast, L-Carnitine, Flaxseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Preservatives - Antioxidants. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D3, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (Niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (Biotin) - B9 (Folic Acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. Nutrient Components Crude Protein 25% Fat Content 14% Ash 7% Crude Cellulose 2.5%   Nutritious Supplements Vitamin A (3A672A) 18,000 IU/kg Vitamine D3 (3A671) 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E (3A700) 150mg/kg Vitamin C (3A300) 200mg/kg   81% animal protein content IMPORTANT AND TO KNOW: Recommended daily feeding amount (grams per day) according to the dog’s bodyweight (kg) and silhouette (A-Thin, B-Normal or C-Overweight), see chart. Daily ration can vary linked to ambient temperature, dog’s lifestyle (indoor-outdoor), temperament and activity. In order to ensure ideal body weight of your dog, weigh out the quantity of food. To provide the correct portions, assess your dog’s appetite, visual appearance and stools. Switch over from one food to another should be done gradually by mixing small amounts of both foods during a period of one week. Ensure that your dog has permanent access to fresh water. Even if the water seems clear, change it at least daily. Keep the product in a dry and cool place and be sure the food bag is properly closed after each feeding. Batch number, factory registration number and best before date, see packaging.
